title: Dungeons of Fear & Hunger — Structure
text: The Dungeons of Fear and Hunger are an ancient fortress beneath the Kingdom of Rondon. The structure spans multiple levels: Level 1 Entrance, Level 2 Basement, Level 3 Prisons / Inner Hall, Level 4 Courtyard, Level 5 Mines, Level 6 Ancient City outskirts, and Level 7 Catacombs. Beneath all is the ancient city of Ma'habre, accessible through the Catacombs near Le'garde's cell. The dungeons feature ritual circles for saving, randomized loot and enemy placements, and environmental storytelling through notes and environmental details. Maps are interconnected through staircases and hidden passages.

title: Entrance — Level 1
text: The Entrance is the starting point. The player begins here after descending into the dungeons. Basic items are available: torches, a Tinderbox/Lighter, and healing herbs. The area connects to the Basement (Level 2). Early enemies include Guards and Maneba (Jagged Jaw). This is a tutorial zone where players learn limb-targeting mechanics and resource management. A ritual circle may be found here.

title: Prisons — Level 3
text: The Prisons contain cells, torture rooms, and hostile Guards. Key NPCs: Buckman (fleeing Trortur), Trortur (the torturer). The Girl is found in a cage here. Elite Guards patrol this area. A ritual circle exists in a safer room. This area contains lore through Torturer's Notes and the Diary of an Unknown Guard. The player can choose to kill Trortur for Buckman's quest or betray Buckman to Trortur.

title: Courtyard — Level 4
text: The Courtyard is an open area featuring statues, a well, and multiple connections. It serves as a crossroads linking the Entrance, Prisons, Library, and Mines. Guard Ballistas and Cave Gnomes patrol here. Notable NPCs may pass through. The Courtyard is a critical junction point for navigation and strategic planning.

title: Mines — Level 5
text: The Mines are extremely dark — torches are essential. Cave Gnomes are the primary enemy. The area contains mining equipment, dangerous pits, valuable ore, and crafting materials. Falling into pits can lead to secret areas or instant death. The Mines connect to deeper dungeon sections. Near the mines is the Cavedweller village on Level 6, and the path to the God of the Depths' mouth.

title: Catacombs — Level 7
text: The Catacombs are the deepest level before Ma'habre. Le'garde is found imprisoned here in a cell. The Cube of the Depths is needed to access Ma'habre nearby. The Catacombs contain dangerous enemies. This is a critical story junction — whether Le'garde is dead or alive determines available endings. Buckman's party (Ser Seymor and possibly Jeanne) may be found in the basement area of this level.

title: Ma'habre — Key Locations
text: Past Ma'habre (thriving): Grand Library (Betel's knowledge), Temple of Torment (Tormented One), Tower of Endless (Nilvan), Temple District (Valteil), Golden Temple (Francois and the Throne of Ascension). Center Square and Downtown connect areas. Present Ma'habre (Ancient City, dilapidated): same layout but decayed, overrun by nature, with different enemies (Cave spiders, Lord of Flies, Scarabs, Uterus). The Cube of the Depths serves as a Beacon to switch between past and present at obelisk devices. Key NPCs in Ma'habre: Pocketcat, Isayah (map merchant), Bug-Eyed Figurine, Ancient Figurine, Old Guardian, Nameless.
